bench_mods.name: Maximum Life
bench_mods.notes: Most impactful life mod. Prioritize T1 on all armour slots.

bench_mods.name: Maximum Mana
bench_mods.notes: Useful when mana reservation is tight or for low-life builds.

bench_mods.name: Life Regeneration per Second
bench_mods.notes: Cheap and stackable passive sustain. Good on multiple slots.

bench_mods.name: Mana Regeneration Rate
bench_mods.notes: Helps non-leech casters sustain mana without flasks.

bench_mods.name: Reduced Mana Cost of Skills
bench_mods.best_tier: -8 to total mana cost of skills
bench_mods.notes: Removes pressure from mana reservation, useful for trigger builds.

bench_mods.name: Fire Resistance
bench_mods.notes: Bench-crafting a resist frees up an affix slot for a better mod.

bench_mods.name: Cold Resistance
bench_mods.notes: Same cost and tier as Fire Resistance.

bench_mods.name: Lightning Resistance
bench_mods.notes: Same cost and tier as Fire and Cold Resistance.

bench_mods.name: All Elemental Resistances
bench_mods.notes: Premium resist fix. Uses an Alchemy, but plugs all three resists at once.

bench_mods.name: Chaos Resistance
bench_mods.notes: Critical in maps with Vulnerability curse or chaos damage map mods.

bench_mods.name: Energy Shield
bench_mods.slots: ES body, ES helm, ES gloves, ES boots, Shield
bench_mods.notes: Primary defensive mod for ES builds. High-ilvl ES gear needed for T1.

bench_mods.name: Armour
bench_mods.slots: Armour body, Armour helm, Armour gloves, Armour boots, Shield
bench_mods.notes: Flat armour adds reliably to armour pool; stack with Determination aura.

bench_mods.name: Evasion Rating
bench_mods.slots: Evasion body, Evasion helm, Evasion gloves, Evasion boots
bench_mods.notes: Stack with Grace aura. Less useful without Acrobatics or high base evasion.

bench_mods.name: Movement Speed
bench_mods.notes: Almost always bench-crafted on boots. Highest-ilvl boots give T1.

bench_mods.name: Spell Suppression Chance
bench_mods.slots: Evasion body, Evasion helm, Evasion gloves, Evasion boots, Shield
bench_mods.notes: Evasion builds aim for 100% suppression (50% spell damage reduction).

bench_mods.name: Block Chance
bench_mods.notes: Shields have a base block; craft pushes toward the 75% block cap.

bench_mods.name: Physical Damage % (local)
bench_mods.notes: Local mod — multiplies that weapon's physical damage only. Core DPS prefix.

bench_mods.name: Adds Fire Damage
bench_mods.notes: High average damage. Synergyises with ignite and fire damage scaling.

bench_mods.name: Adds Cold Damage
bench_mods.notes: Good for cold-conversion builds and freeze mechanics.

bench_mods.name: Adds Lightning Damage
bench_mods.notes: High top end but inconsistent. Excellent for shock-stacking builds.

bench_mods.name: Adds Chaos Damage
bench_mods.notes: Bypasses elemental resistances. Essential for chaos conversion builds.

bench_mods.name: Attack Speed
bench_mods.notes: Multiplies all damage. Always worth craft-patching for attack builds.

bench_mods.name: Cast Speed
bench_mods.notes: DPS multiplier for all spell builds. Especially valuable on wands.

bench_mods.name: Critical Strike Chance
bench_mods.notes: Local mod on weapons. Helps push global crit chance to cap.

bench_mods.name: Critical Strike Multiplier
bench_mods.notes: Huge DPS multiplier for crit builds. Always worth crafting on weapons.

bench_mods.name: Strength
bench_mods.notes: Also grants 2 life per point. Craft when struggling to equip strength-req gear.

bench_mods.name: Dexterity
bench_mods.notes: Dex also grants accuracy and evasion. Needed for Dex-requirement skills.

bench_mods.name: Intelligence
bench_mods.notes: Int grants 2 mana per point. Needed for int-requirement skills and ES.

bench_mods.name: Reduced Flask Charges Used
bench_mods.notes: Dramatically extends flask uptime. Near-mandatory for endgame belts.

bench_mods.name: Accuracy Rating
bench_mods.notes: Attack builds need ~95% hit chance. Craft accuracy before investing elsewhere.

tips: Crafting overwrites any existing mod of the same type (prefix or suffix) — plan ahead.
Use 'Prefixes Cannot be Changed' before crafting a suffix to protect good prefixes.
A crafted mod can be removed with a single Orb of Scouring if the item is magic, or by opening the bench again.
Resistance crafts are the most common bench-craft — they plug cap gaps cheaply.
Movement Speed on boots is almost always bench-crafted — buy boots with good prefixes and craft the suffix.
